title: Trains Collide in Denmark, Leaving 5 Critically Injured
summary_full: The head-on collision of two local trains happened north of Copenhagen on Thursday morning, the authorities said. The cause was not yet known.
summary_public: The head-on collision of two local trains happened north of Copenhagen on Thursday morning, the authorities said. The cause was not yet known.
